commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `OPENCLAW_IGNORE_BIND_WARNING` and `OPENCLAW_IGNORE_SPLIT_STATE_WARNING` handling plus tests to silence selected doctor bind/state warnings for managed Docker-out-of-Docker deployments.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main's `noteSecurityWarnings` and `noteStateIntegrity` unconditionally emit the relevant bind/state warnings for the described conditions. I did not run doctor or tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because this external draft PR lacks real behavior proof and changes security-diagnostic policy; ClawSweeper should not repair or replace the branch for contributor-environment proof.

target.title: feat(doctor): suppress warnings for docker-out-of-docker architectures
